description: Use this API to rename one of the groups in the Scenario. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = scenariogrouprename(sgroup, snewname)

parameters.name: sgroup
parameters.description: Name of the group to be renamed. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: snewname
parameters.description: New name to be given to the specified group. (input; no default allowed).
